# RadKit — Store Listing

Use the sections below when filling out the Chrome Web Store and Microsoft Edge Add-ons dashboards.

---

## Short Description (132 characters max for Chrome)

Capture screenshots, annotate with arrows/text/blur, and record your screen — all offline, nothing leaves your device.

---

## Full Description

RadKit is a free, open-source screenshot and screen recording extension that runs entirely on your device. No accounts, no servers, no data collection — just fast, private capture tools.

**Screenshot Capture**
- Five capture modes: visible viewport, select area, full page, timed delay, and screen/window picker
- Built-in annotation editor with arrows, text, shapes, blur, crop, pencil, and lines
- Export as PNG, JPEG, or copy straight to your clipboard
- All captures saved locally so you can revisit them later

**Screen Recording**
- Record your entire screen, a single window, or a browser tab as WebM video
- Choose your frame rate (15/24/30/60 fps) and resolution (up to 4K)
- Optional audio: microphone, system audio, or both
- Circular webcam overlay you can drag anywhere on screen
- Floating control bar with pause, resume, stop, and discard
- Preview recordings in the browser before saving

**Privacy First**
RadKit makes zero network requests. Every capture, edit, and export happens inside your browser. There is no analytics, no telemetry, and no tracking. Your data never leaves your machine.

**Keyboard Shortcuts**
- Alt+S — Capture the visible viewport instantly
- Alt+D — Pick a screen or window to capture

Free and open source under the MIT License.
